MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Continued To Apr-30-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference held this date for Brayton Group 273 in Dept. 503 before Judge Robertson. Appearing were Sal Timpano, Esq. of Brayton/Purcell, for plaintiffs; Margaret Mahaffey, Esq. of Wallsworth, Franklin, Bevins & McCall for defendant Quintec; Jared MacDonald, Esq. of Keesal, Young & Logan for defendant Lear Siegler; Lisa Delehunt, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLp for defendant Honeywell; Steven Enochian, Esq. for defendant Gillig; and Peter Hart, Esq. of Wright, Robinson, Osthimer & tatum for defendant Freightliner.
The Court and counsel conferred regarding settlement. Counsel for plaintiff represented to the Court that the claims against defendants Lear Sieglar and Quintec were resolved. The Court ordered a further settlement conference in Dept. 503 at 10:00 a.m. on April 30th, 2004 regarding the claims against defendants Gillig and Freightliner in the event such claims are not previously resolved, and a further settlement conference in Dept. 503 at 3:00 p.m. on May 10, 2004 regarding the claims against defendant Honeywell in the event such claims are not previously resolved. Mr. Brayton is ordered to appear in person at the scheduled settlement conferences, and to call Judge Robertson personally in the event of his inability to appear.
